content: Leakage risk is central for ATP prediction: scikit-learn warns that using information unavailable at prediction time causes optimistic estimates, and sports modeling literature recommends chronological segmentation because upcoming matches must be predicted from past matches only. For this project, rankings, age, match stats, Elo, form, and H2H must be built from state available before match start or at least before tournament week, using walk-forward construction and tests that fail on future-dated inputs.
